subcodes.first_line: O nightingale of the garden of meanings, that epistle which thou didst pen after thy return from Servistan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عندلیب گلشن معانی نامه ایکه بعد از رجوع از سروستان مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @methods of teaching the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @unity of thought and belief
